name: Simone Biles
title: Olympic Gymnast
bio: American artistic gymnast with 37 Olympic and World Championship medals combined, the most decorated gymnast in history.
faith: Biles has shared her Christian faith on social media and in interviews. She has posted scripture on social media and has said her faith helps her through difficult times, including her courageous decision to prioritize mental health at the 2020 Olympics.

videos.title: God is Powerful - Simone Biles Religion Revealed
videos.note: Explores Biles faith in God and how it shapes her life. 759K views

videos.title: In Gods Hands: Simone Biles on the Great Advice that Changed Her Life
videos.note: CBN News interview about the role of faith in her life and career

videos.title: Simone Biles attributes Olympic success to her faith
videos.note: Fox News — Biles credits God for her Olympic success

sources.title: Simone Biles — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the most decorated gymnast in history

sources.title: Courage to Soar: A Body in Motion, A Life in Balance
sources.note: By Simone Biles (Zondervan, 2016). Her autobiography discusses her Catholic faith and how prayer and trust in God sustain her through competition and adversity

sources.title: How Simone Biles' Faith Guides Her
sources.note: Biles has shared publicly that her faith helped her through the Larry Nassar abuse scandal and her mental health struggles at the 2020 Olympics

tagline: The greatest gymnast ever, anchored by her faith through every trial
